full_text:
Xiahou Ying 夏侯嬰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Ying (夏侯嬰). Xiahou Dun’s ancestor. Western Han. Served alongside Liu Bang. Xiahou Ying was affiliated with the Western Han Dynasty. Xiahou Ying lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
